mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_TES_IDX1) */ TES_SEQ, REQ_TYPE, DECODE(REQ_TYPE, 'BS_TES_CHARGE', 'TES충전알', 'BS_TES_QUERY', 'TES조회', '') REQ_TYPE_NM, CONTRACT_NUM, RECHARGE_AGENT, RECHARGE, RET_CODE, RET_MSG, RCG_SEQ, O_AMOUNT, O_TES_CHARGE_MAX, O_TES_BASER, O_TES_CHGR, O_TES_MAGICR, O_TES_FSMSR, O_TES_VIDEOR, O_TES_IPVASR, O_TES_IPMAXR, O_TES_SMSM, O_TES_DATAPLUSV, RECHARGE_IP, REQ_DATE, ADMIN_ID, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(ADMIN_ID) ADMIN_NM FROM PPS_RCG_TES A WHERE REQ_DATE > TO_DATE('1900-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REQ_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND REQ_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')+1
AND REQ_TYPE = #{searchReqType}
AND RECHARGE_AGENT = #{searchRechargeAgent}
AND RET_CODE = '0000'
AND RET_CODE <> '0000'
